title: Chickenmeat
description: A cursed minecraft mod that adds chicken meats and other random things like decorational blocks.
body:
A cursed Minecraft mod that more adds from normal food like chicken nuggets to cursed things like Block of Cooked Chicken and Block of Raw Chicken. This mod is mostly for people that want to make their minecraft world cursed. 

![Raw chicken blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7f9dc55e5cfa81739310f4c2827cb2a716b35e7.png)
